\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4285 introduces Clock Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$V(x,t_{\text{clock}})=\tfrac12 e_\phi^2 + \lambda_n e_n + \tfrac12\lambda_\psi e_\psi^2 + \tfrac12\lambda_t e_t^2$
\]
